mapper.sql: id, stable_key, core_object_type, label, data_type, semantics, allowed_override, source, aliases, revision, created_at, updated_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO core_field_catalog (id, stable_key, core_object_type, label, data_type, semantics, allowed_override, source, aliases, revision, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{id, typeHandler=com.pdp.persistence.typehandler.UuidBinaryTypeHandler}, #{stableKey}, #{coreObjectType}, #{label}, #{dataType, typeHandler=com.pdp.persistence.typehandler.StringEnumTypeHandler}, #{semantics}, #{allowedOverride}, #{source, typeHandler=com.pdp.persistence.typehandler.StringEnumTypeHandler}, #{aliasesJson}, #{revision}, #{createdAt, typeHandler=com.pdp.persistence.typehandler.InstantTypeHandler}, #{updatedAt, typeHandler=com.pdp.persistence.typehandler.InstantTypeHandler})
mapper.update: UPDATE core_field_catalog SET label = #{label}, semantics = #{semantics}, allowed_override = #{allowedOverride}, aliases = #{aliasesJson}, data_type = #{dataType, typeHandler=com.pdp.persistence.typehandler.StringEnumTypeHandler}, updated_at = #{now, typeHandler=com.pdp.persistence.typehandler.InstantTypeHandler}, revision = revision + 1 WHERE id = #{id, typeHandler=com.pdp.persistence.typehandler.UuidBinaryTypeHandler} AND revision = #{expectedRevision}
